title: Tangy Crunchy Polish Garlic Gyoza
description: Romantic Polish dish featuring garlic, crunchy texture and tangy flavors. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Wonton wrappers
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian markets or online

instructions: Wrap wonton wrappers around a small amount of garlic and a sprinkle of sesame seeds.
Place a small amount of yogurt in the center of each wrapper and fold into a triangle.
Repeat the process with the remaining ingredients, making sure to space them evenly apart on a baking sheet.
Dip the baking sheet into a bowl of cold water and then place it in the refrigerator to chill for 30 minutes.
Preheat a large skillet over medium heat and add the olive oil.
When the oil is hot, add the gyoza and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the gyoza hot with a dollop of sour cream and a sprinkle of chopped dill and scallions.
Garnish with lemon juice and a pinch of salt and black pepper.
